title: Aureline canonical transient-preview-surface contract: tooltip, hovercard, popover, peek panel, pinning, and promotion
description: Boundary schema for the transient-surface primitives frozen in docs/ux/transient_surface_contract.md. The transient_preview_record is one structured preview (tooltip, hovercard, popover, or peek_panel) keyed by preview_id and bound to a canonical_object_target_ref; the preview_escalation_rule_record is one row per preview_surface_kind declaring default triggers, allowed escalation tiers, forbidden surfaces, the minimum-tier mapping per content_consequence_class, required keyboard routes, and the touch-fallback rule; the pinned_preview_record is one record per user-pinned or promoted preview that preserves canonical identity, attribution, freshness, and AI-confidence disclosure across the transition from transient to durable. Adding a new preview_surface_kind, trigger_kind, content_consequence_class, freshness_class, stale_state_class, mapping_quality_class, representation_label_class, attribution_source_class, promote_action_kind, keyboard_route_kind, ai_confidence_class, or denial_reason is additive-minor and requires a transient_surface_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row. Raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, raw completion text, and raw credential material never cross the RPC boundary; this schema carries ids, typed vocabulary, and short privacy-safe labels only. This schema is the cross-tool preview-surface boundary every non-owning surface reads; the owning runtime's Rust types remain the schema of record.

transient_surface_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this transient-surface vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / pinned-preview exports. Raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, and raw credential material never appear here.

instance_schema_hint.description: Optional schema hint carried on worked fixtures.

short_label_text.description: Short, privacy-safe label text intended for direct rendering on a preview surface or pinned-preview export. MUST NOT embed raw paths, raw URLs, raw secret material, raw customer-owned identifiers, or raw AI prompt / completion text.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source. Wall-clock display text is a derived concern; the canonical storage timestamp is always UTC and monotonic so that ordering, export, and replay remain reproducible across time-zone, daylight-saving, and skew boundaries.

exercised_axes.description: Optional worked-example summary of the vocabulary values the fixture exercises.

fixture_metadata.description: Optional worked-example prelude carried on fixtures.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). The broker-owned redaction pass (ADR-0007) runs before bytes reach any persistent or exportable sink, including summary labels, age labels, and provider attribution labels rendered on previews.

preview_surface_kind.description: Closed preview-surface-kind vocabulary. tooltip is a single-line identity render with no embedded actions; hovercard is a multi-field summary that disappears on pointer leave; popover is an anchored panel that persists until dismissed; peek_panel is an in-surface full preview; full_sheet_or_tab is the named escalation target (not itself a transient surface). A surface that invents a private preview kind for one of these cases is non-conforming.

trigger_kind.description: Closed trigger-kind vocabulary naming what caused the preview to be presented. pointer_dwell is pointer hover past threshold; focus_dwell is focus landing on the anchor; keyboard_invocation is keyboard shortcut while focused; touch_long_press is touch long-press; explicit_invoke is a menu / command / peek action.

content_consequence_class.description: Closed content-consequence vocabulary binding each class to a minimum preview-surface tier. safety_critical_recovery_instruction and approval_required_instruction MUST NOT live in tooltip-only deliveries; they escalate to peek_panel plus a durable promotion target and MUST be pointer-hover-independent.

attribution_source_class.description: Closed attribution-source vocabulary. Every preview names exactly one. extension_contributed and cached_mirror_of_external MUST carry a non-null provider_attribution_label; ai_assisted and ai_generated MUST disclose ai_confidence_class.

representation_label_class.description: Closed representation-label vocabulary naming what kind of render this preview is. cached_snippet_with_age_label MUST carry a non-null age_label; ai_derivation_with_confidence MUST carry a non-null ai_confidence_class.

freshness_class.description: Closed freshness-class vocabulary. live_authoritative is first-party live observation; cached_last_known_good is cached from a currently reachable source within TTL; stale_past_ttl is cache TTL expired; remote_unreachable_cached is cached with live source presently unreachable; generated_synthesized is first-party synthesis (not AI); ai_assisted_derivation is AI-assisted content with human anchors; approximate_best_effort is near-match / fuzzy / type-only rendering.

stale_state_class.description: Closed stale-state vocabulary. vanished_target_* values MUST pair with mapping_quality_class in unavailable_target_* and a non-null unavailability_reason_label. stale_basis_drifted is reserved for rows whose subscription basis fired invalidation (ADR-0005) before re-derivation.

mapping_quality_class.description: Closed mapping-quality vocabulary. exact_canonical_target names an exact resolution; near_match_fuzzy and type_only_no_instance name degraded resolutions that MUST set representation_label_class = approximate_preview; unavailable_target_* name vanished / moved / policy-blocked targets and MUST carry a non-null unavailability_reason_label.

ai_confidence_class.description: Closed AI-confidence vocabulary. Required (non-null) whenever attribution_source_class is ai_assisted or ai_generated, or freshness_class is ai_assisted_derivation, or representation_label_class is ai_derivation_with_confidence. A preview whose attribution is AI but whose confidence is undisclosed is non-conforming (denial_reason = ai_derivation_undisclosed).

keyboard_route_kind.description: Closed keyboard-route vocabulary. Every preview MUST expose at least one route. show_details_focus_ring exposes the preview on focus without pointer hover; invoke_primary_promote invokes the primary promote action; pin_current_preview pins via keyboard; escalate_next_tier escalates to the next allowed surface-kind tier; dismiss_preview dismisses without mutating the underlying object; open_canonical_target opens the canonical target.

promote_action_kind.description: Closed promote-action vocabulary. A preview MUST expose at least one entry. escalate_to_next_tier names an in-surface upgrade (tooltip → hovercard, hovercard → popover / peek, peek → full_sheet_or_tab); the other values name durable destinations. Promoting to a generic home screen, a search box, or an external URL is non-conforming (denial_reason = promote_to_generic_home_screen).

promote_target_kind.description: Closed promote-target vocabulary. The target of a promote_action_record or a pinned_preview_record's promote_target_record. audit_trail_only is reserved for pins whose exact durable target is policy-blocked or redacted; not_available_linkback_lost is reserved for pins of vanished targets. pinned_preview_surface names the shell pinned-previews strip / sidebar.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the transient-surface audit stream. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a tooltip-only delivery, a hover-dependent safety-critical instruction, a home-screen promotion, or a pinned preview that dropped canonical identity is forbidden.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Null when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. Re-validated on every render and on every pin / promote.

target_identity_ref.description: Opaque target id. Null only when target_kind is audit_trail_only or not_available_linkback_lost, or when kind is escalate_to_next_tier (the next-tier preview is minted on invocation).

is_durable.description: True when the promote target persists across the current session. A promote action on safety-critical or approval-required content MUST be durable.

announcement_label.description: Short accessibility-announcement label read when the promote action receives focus.

allOf.description: target_kind = audit_trail_only MUST record is_durable = false.
target_kind = not_available_linkback_lost MUST record is_durable = false.

promote_action_record.description: One promote action offered by a preview. Every preview MUST expose at least one record whose kind resolves to a durable destination (or escalate_to_next_tier for in-surface upgrade).

canonical_object_target_ref.description: Opaque reference to the canonical object the preview is about (symbol, file, run, evidence row, provider grant, review item, diff hunk). Raw paths, raw URLs, raw handles, raw prompt text never cross the boundary.

ai_confidence_class.description: Required (non-null) when attribution_source_class is ai_assisted or ai_generated, freshness_class is ai_assisted_derivation, or representation_label_class is ai_derivation_with_confidence.

summary_label.description: Short privacy-safe summary label rendered on the preview. MUST obey the redaction_class rules; MUST NOT embed raw paths, raw URLs, raw secret material, raw customer-owned identifiers, or raw AI prompt / completion text.

provider_attribution_label.description: Required (non-null) when attribution_source_class is extension_contributed, cached_mirror_of_external, remote_agent_reported, companion_reported, or an AI class that carries a named provider. Names the extension, remote source, or provider.

age_label.description: Required (non-null) when freshness_class is cached_last_known_good, stale_past_ttl, remote_unreachable_cached, or when representation_label_class is cached_snippet_with_age_label. Short label describing how old the cached / stale / remote content is (e.g. 'Cached 7 minutes ago').

unavailability_reason_label.description: Required (non-null) when mapping_quality_class is one of the unavailable_target_* values. Short privacy-safe reason (moved / missing extension / policy-blocked / stale remote / target removed).

freshness_observed_at.description: Monotonic UTC timestamp at which freshness was last observed. On cached / stale / remote-unreachable previews this names the observation of the last-known-good state.

pointer_hover_dependent.description: True when the preview is only reachable via pointer hover. MUST be false when content_consequence_class is non_reversible_consequential, safety_critical_recovery_instruction, or approval_required_instruction (denial_reason = pointer_hover_dependent_for_consequential_content).

keyboard_route_kinds_available.description: Closed set of keyboard routes this preview exposes. A preview with an empty array is non-conforming (denial_reason = preview_missing_keyboard_route).

touch_fallback_trigger_kind.description: How this preview is reachable on a touch surface. MUST be touch_long_press for tooltip and hovercard; MUST be explicit_invoke for popover and peek_panel. A surface that renders a hovercard on desktop and nothing on touch is non-conforming (denial_reason = preview_missing_touch_fallback).

escalation_rule_ref.description: Opaque reference to a preview_escalation_rule_record whose preview_surface_kind matches this record. Bindings the preview to the frozen escalation rule for its surface kind.

allowed_promote_actions.description: Non-empty list of promote actions the preview exposes. A preview whose list is empty is non-conforming (denial_reason = transient_surface_missing_escalation_path).

linked_history_row_id_ref.description: Opaque reference to a history_row_record (schemas/ux/history_row.schema.json) when this preview surfaces a chronology row. Preserves chronology identity through preview and promotion.

linked_canonical_event_id_ref.description: Opaque reference to an event_lineage_record's canonical_event_id (schemas/ux/event_lineage.schema.json) when this preview surfaces a lineage-bearing delivery.

interaction_safety_packet_id_ref.description: Opaque reference to an interaction_safety_packet_record (schemas/ux/interaction_safety.schema.json) when this preview surfaces a consequence-bearing interaction.

allOf.description: content_consequence_class = safety_critical_recovery_instruction MUST NOT use preview_surface_kind in {tooltip, hovercard}.
content_consequence_class = approval_required_instruction MUST NOT use preview_surface_kind in {tooltip, hovercard}.
content_consequence_class in {non_reversible_consequential, safety_critical_recovery_instruction, approval_required_instruction} MUST set pointer_hover_dependent = false.
attribution_source_class in {ai_assisted, ai_generated} MUST disclose ai_confidence_class.
freshness_class = ai_assisted_derivation MUST disclose ai_confidence_class and use representation_label_class = ai_derivation_with_confidence.
representation_label_class = ai_derivation_with_confidence MUST disclose ai_confidence_class.
freshness_class in {cached_last_known_good, stale_past_ttl, remote_unreachable_cached} MUST carry a non-null age_label.
representation_label_class = cached_snippet_with_age_label MUST carry a non-null age_label.
mapping_quality_class in unavailable_target_* MUST carry a non-null unavailability_reason_label.
stale_state_class in vanished_target_* MUST pair with mapping_quality_class in unavailable_target_*.
freshness_class = approximate_best_effort MUST use representation_label_class = approximate_preview and mapping_quality_class in {near_match_fuzzy, type_only_no_instance}.
preview_surface_kind in {tooltip, hovercard} MUST have touch_fallback_trigger_kind = touch_long_press.
preview_surface_kind in {popover, peek_panel} MUST have touch_fallback_trigger_kind = explicit_invoke.
preview_surface_kind = tooltip MUST NOT expose promote_action kinds beyond escalate_to_next_tier or open_canonical_target_exact; tooltips do not carry embedded actions.

transient_preview_record.description: Per-preview transient-surface record. Keeps one structured record of the preview so every surface — tooltip, hovercard, popover, peek_panel — carries the same canonical target id, provenance, representation, freshness, mapping quality, keyboard routes, touch fallback, and promote actions. Pinning or promoting mints a pinned_preview_record that preserves identity, provider attribution, freshness, and AI-confidence disclosure.

default_trigger_kinds.description: Default triggers for this preview surface kind.

allowed_escalation_tiers.description: Preview surface kinds this surface MAY escalate to. full_sheet_or_tab is the terminal escalation target.

forbidden_surface_kinds.description: Preview surface kinds this surface MUST NOT escalate to.

minimum_tier_by_content_consequence_clas.description: Binds each content_consequence_class to the minimum preview-surface tier the surface MAY render on. safety_critical_recovery_instruction and approval_required_instruction MUST map to peek_panel or full_sheet_or_tab; mapping either to tooltip or hovercard is non-conforming.

required_keyboard_route_kinds.description: Minimum keyboard routes every preview in this surface kind MUST expose.

required_touch_fallback_trigger_kind.description: Required touch fallback. touch_long_press for tooltip and hovercard; explicit_invoke for popover and peek_panel.

notes_label.description: Short privacy-safe note describing the canonical use of this preview kind.

allOf.description: For every rule row, safety_critical_recovery_instruction and approval_required_instruction MUST map to peek_panel or full_sheet_or_tab.

preview_escalation_rule_record.description: One row per preview_surface_kind freezing default triggers, allowed escalation tiers, forbidden surfaces, the minimum-tier mapping per content_consequence_class, required keyboard routes, and the touch-fallback rule. A surface that mints a local escalation rule for one of the four transient-surface kinds is non-conforming.

source_preview_id_ref.description: Opaque reference to the transient_preview_record this pin derives from. Null only when the pin was minted outside an active preview session (e.g. a pin reconstructed from a support bundle).

canonical_object_target_ref.description: Opaque reference to the canonical object the pin is about. MUST equal the source preview's canonical_object_target_ref when source_preview_id_ref is non-null; otherwise the surface that mints the pin is responsible for anchoring it to a canonical target. A pin that drops or rewrites the canonical target is non-conforming (denial_reason = promote_lost_canonical_identity).

freshness_at_pin_time.description: Freshness class recorded at the instant the pin was minted. The pin does not silently refresh to current; a pinned view that claims live authority without re-observing the source is non-conforming.

ai_confidence_class.description: Required (non-null) when attribution_source_class is ai_assisted or ai_generated, or freshness_at_pin_time is ai_assisted_derivation, or representation_label_class is ai_derivation_with_confidence. A pin that drops AI-confidence disclosure is non-conforming (denial_reason = promote_ai_without_confidence_disclosure).

summary_label.description: Short privacy-safe summary label rendered on the pin.

provider_attribution_label.description: Required (non-null) when attribution_source_class is extension_contributed, cached_mirror_of_external, remote_agent_reported, companion_reported, or an AI class that carries a named provider. A pin that drops provider attribution is non-conforming (denial_reason = promote_lost_provider_attribution).

age_label.description: Required (non-null) when freshness_at_pin_time is cached_last_known_good, stale_past_ttl, remote_unreachable_cached, or when representation_label_class is cached_snippet_with_age_label.

unavailability_reason_label.description: Required (non-null) when mapping_quality_class is one of the unavailable_target_* values. A pin of a vanished target preserves the fact that the target was already vanished at pin time.

freshness_observed_at_pin.description: Monotonic UTC timestamp at which freshness was observed at pin time. Distinct from pinned_at when the freshness observation preceded the pin.

promote_target_record.description: The durable promotion target the pin resolves to. For pins of live or cached targets this resolves to canonical_object_target_exact, full_detail_sheet, review_sheet, diff_view, durable_job_row_exact, or evidence_packet_row; for pins of vanished / policy-blocked targets this resolves to audit_trail_only or not_available_linkback_lost.

linked_history_row_id_ref.description: Opaque reference to a history_row_record when the pinned object is a chronology row.

allOf.description: attribution_source_class in {ai_assisted, ai_generated} MUST disclose ai_confidence_class.
freshness_at_pin_time = ai_assisted_derivation MUST disclose ai_confidence_class and use representation_label_class = ai_derivation_with_confidence.
freshness_at_pin_time in {cached_last_known_good, stale_past_ttl, remote_unreachable_cached} MUST carry a non-null age_label.
mapping_quality_class in unavailable_target_* MUST carry a non-null unavailability_reason_label and a promote_target_record whose target_kind is audit_trail_only or not_available_linkback_lost.
stale_state_at_pin in vanished_target_* MUST pair with mapping_quality_class in unavailable_target_*.
attribution_source_class in {extension_contributed, cached_mirror_of_external} MUST carry provider_attribution_label.

pinned_preview_record.description: Per-pin pinned-preview record minted when a user pins or promotes a transient preview. Preserves canonical object identity, attribution, representation label, freshness-at-pin-time, stale state at pin, mapping quality, AI-confidence disclosure, and the durable promotion target. A pin is the durable mirror of a transient preview; the contract forbids dropping any of those axes during the transition.
